sub_pixel_system.notes: Rail shooter with 3D perspective; sub-pixel movement data not documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Arwing Thrusters
special_mechanics.description: Thrusters and retro-rockets allow temporary speed increases or decreases for maneuvering around enemy attacks and obstacles

special_mechanics.name: Wing Damage System
special_mechanics.description: If ship's wings clip against obstacles or ground excessively, they break off, adversely affecting handling and removing weapon upgrade ability

special_mechanics.name: Shield Energy System
special_mechanics.description: Damage is incurred incrementally via loss of shield energy before craft destruction

tier_notes: Tier 1 (Empirical/Qualitative): Star Fox is a rail shooter, not a platformer. Available documentation focuses on game design, features, and narrative rather than precise movement physics parameters. No specific numerical values for gravity, jump physics, acceleration, or sub-pixel systems are documented in sources provided. Movement controlled through Arwing spacecraft with thrust and retro-rocket mechanics rather than character movement. Exact physics parameters would require ROM analysis or developer documentation not present in these sources.
